subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath revealed the verses in wondrous melody, made manifest His proof, and caused His evidence to shine forth in such wise [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی نزل الایات علی لحن بدیعا و ظهر حجته و لاح برهانه علی شان الذی
subcodes.subjects: @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @suffering and imprisonment, @love of God
